label: High fructose corn syrup
reason: Common quick filter for heavily sweetened packaged foods.

label: Hydrogenated oil
reason: Often used when someone wants to reduce trans-fat style ingredients.

label: Nitrites / nitrates
reason: Commonly avoided in processed meat products.

label: Red 40
reason: One of the most commonly filtered artificial colors.

label: Yellow 5
reason: A common artificial dye some users prefer to avoid.

label: Aspartame
reason: Common quick filter for artificial sweeteners.

label: Sucralose
reason: Another common sweetener people often filter out.

label: Acesulfame potassium
reason: Often grouped with other non-sugar sweeteners.

label: Saccharin
reason: Legacy sweetener some users still avoid.

label: Corn syrup
reason: Broader syrup filter beyond HFCS.

label: Dextrose
reason: Simple added sugar filter.

label: Maltodextrin
reason: A very common processed food additive.

label: MSG
reason: Useful for users who want to filter monosodium glutamate specifically.

label: Soy lecithin
reason: Often filtered by users with soy concerns.

label: Natural flavors
reason: A broad label some users prefer to scrutinize.

label: Artificial flavors
reason: Useful as a catch-all for flavor additives.

label: Carrageenan
reason: Seaweed-derived thickener many people choose to filter.

label: Xanthan gum
reason: Common stabilizer some people monitor closely.

label: Guar gum
reason: Another common thickener some users want surfaced.

label: Palm oil
reason: Common oil filter for dietary or sustainability reasons.

label: Canola oil
reason: Often filtered with other seed oils.

label: Soybean oil
reason: Sometimes filtered for soy sensitivity or processing concerns.

label: Cottonseed oil
reason: Included for people screening common refined oils.

label: Sunflower oil
reason: Some users want broad visibility into seed oils.

label: Grapeseed oil
reason: Included for wider refined oil screening.

label: BHA / BHT
reason: Common preservative filter.

label: Sodium benzoate
reason: Common preservative in drinks and packaged foods.

label: Potassium sorbate
reason: Another preservative users often screen.

label: Sulfites
reason: Helpful for people sensitive to sulfite preservatives.

label: Phosphates
reason: Often used in processed foods and meats.

label: Blue 1
reason: Common synthetic dye.

label: Yellow 6
reason: Common synthetic dye.

label: Blue 2
reason: Additional synthetic dye coverage.

label: Green 3
reason: Included for broader dye filtering.

label: Milk
reason: FDA major allergen.

label: Egg
reason: FDA major allergen.

label: Fish
reason: FDA major allergen.

label: Crustacean shellfish
reason: FDA major allergen and part of the EU/UK regulated list.

label: Tree nuts
reason: FDA major allergen.

label: Peanuts
reason: FDA major allergen.

label: Wheat
reason: FDA major allergen and part of cereals containing gluten in the EU/UK list.

label: Soy
reason: FDA major allergen.

label: Sesame
reason: FDA major allergen effective January 1, 2023.

label: Gluten cereals
reason: Part of the EU/UK regulated allergen list.

label: Celery
reason: Part of the EU/UK regulated allergen list.

label: Mustard
reason: Part of the EU/UK regulated allergen list.

label: Lupin
reason: Part of the EU/UK regulated allergen list.

label: Molluscs
reason: Part of the EU/UK regulated allergen list.
